_meta.description: Shona strings for all Yinyang user-facing text.

ui.title: Yinyang
ui.docs_hub_eyebrow: Zvinyorwa zveSolace Browser | Netiweki yemapepa: mapepa 9 akarongwa
ui.docs_hub_lead: Zvese zvaunoda kunzwisisa, kugadzirisa, uye kuwedzera Solace Browser. Yakavakwa paSoftware 5.0 netiweki yemapepa.
ui.docs_hub_card1_desc: Isa Solace Browser, ita otomesheni yako yekutanga, uye nzwisisa maitiro ekubvuma mumaminitsi 5.
ui.docs_hub_card2_desc: Batanidza Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, kana mutumwa chero upi zvake anobatana neMCP kuSolace Browser semuiti wezvishandiso.
ui.docs_hub_card3_desc: Maitiro eOAuth3 ekukuchengetedza: matokeni akapiwa nzvimbo, simba rinoenderana nenguva, magedhi ebajethi, uye maitiro ekuvhara pakukundikana.
ui.docs_hub_card4_desc: Chitungamiriri chizere chekubatanidza Solace Browser nevatumwa vekurodha veAI. Yakaiswa pa solaceagi.com.
ui.docs_hub_card5_desc: Ongorora otomesheni 18+ dzakagadzirwa — kugadzirisa bhokisi reGmail, kubatana paLinkedIn, mafotokozero eSlack, nezvimwe.
ui.docs_hub_card6_desc: Sarudzo dzese dzekugadzirisa: akaunzi, LLM, tuneri, nzvimbo yemuchina, zvehupenyu hwega, uye hunhu hweYinyang.
ui.docs_hub_papers_copy: Solace Browser inotsigirwa nemapepa 9 akarongwa. Pepa rimwe nerimwe rinorondedzera chinhu chisingashanduki muhurongwa.
ui.docs_hub_paper04_desc: Hurongwa hwenjira yekumusoro neyepasi. Maitiro eYinYang ekuratidza mamiriro asingakanganisi kubuda.
ui.docs_hub_paper07_desc: Bajeti yemabasa paphu, miganhu yekushandisa, magedhi ekuvhara pakukundikana, uye kutsigira kwekukwira.
ui.docs_hub_paper09_desc: Kutanga kwekutanga, mapaketi ehunhu anogona kudhaunilodhwa, muitiro wekuita weMCP, nekutaurirana kweYinYang.
ui.home_setup_h3: Wedzera simba rako kuti uvhure maaphu ese
ui.home_setup_p: Uya nekinoti yako yeAPI (mahara) kana shandisa Solace Managed LLM ($8/mwedzi).
ui.home_hero_p: Chiito chimwe nechimwe chinobvumwa newe. Maresiphi anochengeta zvakashanda. Umboo unochengeta kumhanya kwese kwakasiiwa uye kwakagadzirwa kuongororwa nariini.
ui.home_featured_p: Inoverenga bhokisi rako, inoburitsa chete zvinoda kurangarirwa, inonyora mhinduro yekuongorora. Unobvuma kutumira kwese.
ui.home_empty_runs: Hakuna kumhanya kuchiri — tanga aphu rako rekutanga kuti uone zviitiko pano.
ui.home_compliance_h4: Kumhanya kwese kunochengeterwa uye kwakagadzirwa kuongororwa
ui.home_compliance_p: Cheni yeSHA-256 pazviito zvese zvatumwa. Wabvuma matanho ese. Umboo unochengeterwa narini.
ui.home_create_p: Tsanangura zvauri kuda kuotometa. Yinyang inoshandura pfungwa yako kuita aphu rinoshanda mumaminitsi mashoma. Tumira kuChitoro cheMaaphu cheSolace — AI yedu inogadzirisa uye timu inoona.
ui.appstore_eyebrow: Inoshanda nemaakaunzi ako aripo | Hapana kupinda kutsva | Chiito chimwe nechimwe chinoda kubvumwa kwako
ui.appstore_lead: Inoshanda neGmail, Slack, LinkedIn, uye masevhisi 15 akawanda — ichishandisa maakaunzi ako aripo. Hapana kupinda kutsva, hapana zviyedzerwa. Zvitupa zvako hazvibudi mumuchina wako. Chiito chimwe nechimwe chinomirira kubvumwa kwako.
ui.appstore_search_placeholder: Tsvaga maaphu nezita, chikamu, kana sevhisi...
ui.appstore_categories_copy: Zvikamu zvemaaphu zvinotorwa kubva kuAPI uye zvinobatanidzwa. Kusefa kunoshanda nezita, chikamu, uye sevhisi.
ui.appstore_sync_copy: Katarogu yakasarudzwa inotsigirwa negit. Mifungo yevashandisi inoenda kumutsara wekuongorora (faira yepanzvimbo pane dev, Firestore pakubudisa).
ui.appstore_funpacks_copy: Mapaketi emhando yezvinhu zvinogona kudhaunilodhwa anotipa YinYang matsvambe akawanda, zvechokwadi, uye mhando dzehunhu. Mitauro yese 13 inotsigirwa.
ui.appstore_how_copy: Chibvumirano chekusvika: bhokisi rekugamuchira rinogadzirisa, bhokisi rekubudisa rinoratidza basa reAI, iwe unobvuma.
ui.appstore_build_copy: Tsanangura zvauri kuda kuotometa. Yinyang inokutungamirira. Tumira kuchitoro — AI yedu inogadzirisa, timu inoona, uye maaphu akabvumwa anotanga kushanda.
ui.ad_empty_runs: Hakuna kumhanya kuchiri — dzvanya Mhanya Aphu kuti utange.
ui.bench_desc: Puyiti rimwe chete rakaedzwa nemabheki eAI akasiyana. Maitiro anodhura zvishoma anopfuura kuyera kwemhando anokunda.
ui.agent_docs_copy: Kopa munhau yemutumwa wako weAI kuti uwane mhinduro dziri nani
ui.agent_docs_quick_copy: Kopa Nekukurumidza — Isa mumutumwa wako weAI
ui.dash_onboarding_sub: Maaphu akaiswa asi anoda kugadzirwa asati amhanya. Ita matanho aya kana urega mutumwa weAI aite.
ui.dash_agent_setup: Kana rega mutumwa wako weAI agadzirire maaphu ese
ui.appstore_noapi_copy: Masevhisi aya haana API yakarongwa. Solace Browser ndiyo nzira chete yekuotometa awo.
ui.dl_hero_p: Kubhurawuza kwepanzvimbo kutanga nechiratidzo cheOAuth3, kuchengeta kweumboo, nekuotometa kweAI. Dhaunilodha bhinari yedesikitopi kana vaka kubva kumabviro.
ui.dl_verify_p: Kuburitswa kwese kunounza kuongorora kweSHA-256 paPeji reKuburitswa reGitHub. Simbisa kuti kudhaunilodha kwako kunofanana usati wamhanya.
ui.dl_build_p: Solace Browser imabviro anooneka pasi peRezinhasi yeMabviro Inoshanda (FSL-1.1-Apache-2.0). Ongorora kodhi, vaka panzvimbo, ipa zvakanakanaka.
ui.tunnel_desc: Ipa tunnel.connect bhurawuza isati yaburitsa URL yeruzhinji.
ui.tunnel_splash_subtitle: Tuneri inofanira kunzwika: yakajeka zvakakwana kuti izivikanwe, yakanyarara zvakakwana kuti ivimbwe, uye nyore kuvhara basa rapera.
ui.tunnel_consent_p: Kupinda kubva kure kune simba zvakakwana zvekuti bhurawuza haifaniri kuratidza kuti yakabatana kunze kwekunge kubvumwa, URL, nekutonga kwekudzosera zvese zvinooneka kamwe chete.
ui.tunnel_step1_p: Bvumira tunnel.connect chete kuruntime chakarurama chinoda rerere yegore.
ui.tunnel_step2_p: Bhurawuza inoratidza URL chaiyoiyo yeruzhinji pane kuivanza mumalogu kana mashoko emutumwa.
ui.tunnel_step3_p: Peji rimwe chete rinopawo kutonga kwekumisa nemamiriro ekudimburwa anooneka ekuongorora.
ui.machine_h1: Ongorora muganhu wepanzvimbo mutumwa asati aubata.
ui.guide_lead: Titambire kuSolace Browser! Chitungamiriri ichi chinokutungamirira mukubatanidza maakaunzi ako nekumhanyisa otomesheni yako yekutanga. Zvese zvinoitika nekubvumwa kwako — hapana chinomhanya pasina iwe uchiti hongu.
ui.guide_cta_p: Wakagadzirwa kuotometa? Tanga neKugadzirisa Bhokisi reGmail.
ui.ca_hero_sub: Haudi kurodha. Tsanangura zvauri kuda kuotometa nechiShona. Yinyang inoshandura mashoko ako kuita resiphi inoshanda, inoimhanyisa, uye inotumira kuChitoro cheMaaphu kuti vanhu vese vashandise.
ui.ca_step1_desc: Nyora nechiShona. Hapana chinonzi mashoko epamusoro. Yinyang inoverenga mashoko ako uye inogadzira matanho. Maaphu akanaka kupfuura ese ndeaya aunoda kuti akange aripo.
ui.ca_step2_desc: Yinyang yakaverenga tsanangudzo yako uye yakaiparadzanisa kuva matanho. Ongorora pasi apa. Unogona kudzokera uye kugadzirisa tsanangudzo yako, kana kushandura zita reaphu usati waedza.
ui.ca_step3_desc: Yinyang ichaita danho rekutanga reresiphi yako mubhurawuza yako. Hapana chinochengeterwa kana kutumirwa chero kupi. Chiito chimwe nechimwe chinoda kubvumwa kwako — ndiro vimbiso reSolace.
ui.ca_step4_desc: Wasara danho rimwe chete kuti ugoverane aphu rako nenyika. Timu yedu inoona zvatumirwa zvese. Kana zvabvumwa, zvinotanga kushanda paGitHub uye muChitoro cheMaaphu cheSolace — mahara kumunhu wese.
ui.ca_success_p: Timu yedu ichaona zvawakatumira. Kana zvabvumwa, zvinotanga kushanda paGitHub uye muChitoro cheMaaphu cheSolace — mahara kumunhu wese anoda. Uchanzwa paemail yawakaendesa.
ui.dash_favorites_empty: Isa nyeredzi paphu pasi kuti uiise pano.
ui.dash_recent_empty: Hakuna kumhanya kuchiri. Mhanya aphu kuti uone zviitiko pano.
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_start: Sarudza aphu chero ripi zvapo pasi kuti urigadzirire. Rimwe nerimwe rinotora masekondi 30 — ndichakutungamirira.
ui.dash_onboarding_msg_progress: Zvakanaka! {activated} kubva mu{total} maaphu akagadzirwa. {remaining} asara — kana ndinogona kugadzirisa mamwe.
ui.dash_onboarding_agent_setup_all: Kana rega mutumwa wako weAI aite zvese:
ui.glossary_lead: Tsanangudzo dziri nyore dzemashoko ese muSolace Browser. Hapana mashoko epamusoro asina kutsanangurwa.
ui.glossary_recipe_def: Otomesheni yakachengeterwa yaunogona kudzokorora. Maresiphi anochengetedza zvakatwa neAI kuti izokwanise kudzokorora basa rimwe chete isina kudana LLM zvakare. Izvi zvinoita kuti mabasa anodzokororwa ave mahara.
ui.glossary_oauth3_def: Nzira yauri kupa mvumo kumaaphu. OAuth3 inokubvumira kudzora chaizvoizvo zvingaitwa nemutumwa weAI muzita rako, kwenguva yakareba sei, uye kudzosa mvumo chero nguva.
ui.glossary_evidence_chain_def: Chiratidzo chisinga shanduke chezviito zvese zvakaitwa neAI. Chinhu chimwe nechimwe chinobatanidzwa nechinotangira nechisiri chekutanga nehash, saka unogona kuvimbisa nguva dzese zvakaitika, riini, uye murongwa ipi.
ui.glossary_twin_def: Sesoni yebhurawuza inomhanya mugore muzita rako. Kamuri yako yegore inogona kuita maresiphi kunyange kompyuta yako yakadzimwa, ichishandisa mvumo yawakapa kuburikidza neOAuth3.
ui.glossary_app_store_def: Katarogu yakasarudzwa yezviitiko zvekuotometa zvaunogona kuisa uye kumhanyisa. Aphu rimwe nerimwe rinoratidza zvaanoita, mvumo dzaanoda, uye rinoda kubvumwa kwako usati waita chiito chero chipi.
ui.glossary_vault_def: Nzvimbo yekuchengetera yakavharwa, yakapanzvimbo, yemakiyi eAPI nematokeni esesoni. Zvitupa zvako zvinogara pachida chako, zvakachengetedzwa nekubhokisa kweAES-256-GCM. Solace haitongooni mapasiwedhi ako.
ui.glossary_approval_gate_def: Nzvimbo panomira AI ichikukumbira mvumo usati waita chimwe chinhu. Hapana chinomhanya pasina hongu yako yakanyatsooneka. Kana ukabva, zviitiko zvakamira zvinofungidzwa.
ui.glossary_budget_gate_def: Muganhu wekushandisa waunoisa pamabasa eAI. Kana basa richipfuura bajethi yako, hurongwa hunomira uye hunokumbira mvumo. Izvi zvinodzivirira mari inenge yashaya mwero.
ui.glossary_yinyang_def: Mubatsiri weAI mukati meSolace Browser. YinYang inokubatsira kufamba, kupindura mibvunzo, uye kuronga otomesheni. Inogara ichibvunza isati yaita.
ui.glossary_byok_def: Shandisa kiyi yako yeAPI yeAI kubva kuAnthropic, OpenAI, kana vamwe vapiwa. Hatitongomukwidzi mutengo uye kiyi yako inogara pachida chako.
ui.glossary_capsule_def: Paketi yakazvimirira yeaphu inobatanidza kodhi, data, nemvumo mubhokisi rimwe rinofamba. Ma capsule anogona kugoverwa, kupiwa maitiro, uye kudzokororwa zvinooneka.
ui.glossary_northstar_def: Chinongedzo chedanho rese. Northstar inoona kuti chikamu chimwe nechimwe, chisarudzo chimwe nechimwe, uye otomesheni imwe neimwe inoshumira chinangwa chimwe: kukuchengeta uri mudzoro weAI yako.
ui.glossary_preview_def: Danho raYinYang rinokuratidza zvainoda kuita isati yaita. LLM inodanwa kamwe kugadzira kuongorora, iwe unobvuma kana kuramba, uye zvadaro ndipo kuita kunoitika. Izvi zvinoita kuti kumhanya kunodzokororwa kuve mahara.
ui.glossary_scope_def: Mvumo yakarurama inopiwa kuaphu kuburikidza neOAuth3. Nzvimbo dzinorondedzera chaizvoizvo zvinogona kuitwa nemutumwa — somuenzaniso, kuverenga bhokisi rako asi kwete kutumira email. Nzvimbo duku zvinoreva njodzi shoma.
ui.glossary_rung_def: Gwaro rekuvimba mumaratidziro ekuongorora. Matanho akakwirira anovhura kugona kwakawanda asi anoda umboo wakawanda wemaitiro akanaka. Maaphu anotanga padanho rapasi-pasi uye anowana kuvimbwa nekufamba kwenguva.
ui.start_tagline: Maaphu eAI eGmail, Slack, LinkedIn, nezvimwe 25. Iwe unobvuma zvese.
ui.start_connected_desc: Solace Browser yako yakabatana. Mushandi weAI akagadzirwa.

playful.greeting: Heyyy! Wagadzirira kuvaka chimwe chinhu chakanaka?
playful.error: Aah! Tawira pachipingaidzo. Hatina basa, tine izvi!

milestones.streak_14: Mazuva 14 — mavhiki maviri ekuita zvakanaka. Ndiwe wechokwadi.
milestones.streak_30: Mazuva 30 akatevedzana! Mwedzi wekunyora zuva nezuva.
milestones.streak_60: Mazuva 60 — mwedzi miviri. Ichi chisina kuva tsika.
milestones.streak_90: Mazuva 90 — kuziva kuri kukura. Ramba uchienda.
milestones.keep_going: Ramba uchienda! Zuva rimwe nerimwe rinovaka simba.

celebrations.c001: Kumhanya kwako kwekutanga kwapera! Zvese zvashanda.
celebrations.c002: Aphu raiswa! Mushandi wako weAI akagadzirwa.
celebrations.c006: Mazuva 7 akatevedzana! Kutsungirira ndiro simba rako.
celebrations.c008: Zuva rekuberekwa rakanaka! Kune rimwe gore rebasa rakanaka.
celebrations.c012: Mabasa ekutanga emaaphu akawanda apera! Maaphu achishanda pamwe chete.
celebrations.c013: Tsanangudzo yako yemagwana yakagadzirwa. Kofi + tsanangudzo = kutanga kwakanaka.
celebrations.c014: Cheni yeumboo yakaongororwa. Nzira yese yeumboo iri nani.
celebrations.c015: Maaphu ese ari musimba. Zvese zviri kumhanya zvakanaka.
celebrations.c017: Kubvuma kwekutanga! Uri mudzoro — nguva dzese.
celebrations.c018: Tsanangudzo yako yevhiki yakagadzirwa. Heino vhiki yako.
celebrations.c019: Wawana easter egg! Iwe uri munhu wetsika.
celebrations.c020: Kumhanya uko kwaiva $0.00 — kudzokorora resiphi kubva muchengeto. Mahara zvakanaka.

smalltalk.s003: Titambire. Ndinovimbisa ndiri nani kupfuura chizunguliro chinoimba.
smalltalk.s004: Mhoroi! Ndinoshanda nekuda kuziva uye data yekudzidzira yakawanda.
smalltalk.s005: Hesi. Ndongorangarira sehwatumwa hwako — iwe unotyaira, ini ndinofambisa.
smalltalk.s006: Kekutanga pano? Ndichaita zviri nyore. Bvunza chero chii kana ndipe basa.
smalltalk.s007: Titambire kuSolace. Zvese zvandinoita, iwe unobvuma kutanga.
smalltalk.s012: Ndafara kukuona. Ndanga ndichigadzirisa ma neural weight angu.
smalltalk.s014: Wadzoka. WiFi yakakumissa. Ini ndiri nhume chete.
smalltalk.s015: Ndakakumissa. Zvakanaka, handimboitira vanhu. Asi dai ndaikwanisa, ndaizoita.
smalltalk.s020: Ndichiri pano. Ndichiri kugadzirwa. Ndichiri handikwanisi kugadzira kofi.
smalltalk.s021: Pfungwa yakamira: ko maAI anorota makwai emagetsi? Ndiri kubvunzira shamwari.
smalltalk.s022: Ndakangogara pano, ndichiverenga mabhiti. Zvinofadza zvimwe chetezvo.
smalltalk.s023: Handisi kurara. Ndiri mumagetsi mashoma. Zvakasiyana zvachose.
smalltalk.s030: Waizviziva here kuti webcam yekutanga yakagadzirwa kuti iongorore kana mug yekofi isina chinhu?
smalltalk.s031: Pfungwa yekuvedzerana: pane mitsapano yakawanda yechess kupfuura ma atoms munzvimbo inooneka.
smalltalk.s032: Heino imwe: sea otters dzinobatana maoko padzinokotsira kuti dzisaparadzane. Titambire.
smalltalk.s033: Keyboard yeQWERTY yakagadzirirwa kuti ikudzorere. Wakatengwa kubva pakutanga.
smalltalk.s034: Uchi hauombi. Vakawana uchi wemakore 3,000 mumakuva eEgypt uye waiva uchidyika.
smalltalk.s035: Waizviziva here kuti makambeni ane mwoyo mitatu? Ndezviviri kupfuura hurukuro dzangu dzakawanda.
smalltalk.s040: Ndingakuudze joke, asi chipanda changu chekusekanisa chichiri mu beta.
smalltalk.s041: Ndaida kunonoka, asi ndakasarudza kuita izvi gare gare.
smalltalk.s042: Mitambo yangu yandinoda kupfuura ndeyakabatana lunge necrunch. Ndinoidana chikafu chemasikati.
smalltalk.s043: Handina chiso chezororo. Ndine chiso chekufunga.
smalltalk.s044: Ndakaedza kuva asina kufunga kamwe. Ndaifanira kuirongera kare.
smalltalk.s045: Handisi kupikisana nevamwe vabatsiri. Tiri mu... hongu, industri imwe chete.
smalltalk.s050: Une makuva ematabs? Ndinogona kubatsira kugadzirisa.
smalltalk.s051: Unoda kuotometa chimwe chinhu chinonetsa? Ndizvo chinangwa changu.
smalltalk.s052: Chii chinonetsa kupfuura zvose pamazita ako? Rega ndiedzeze.
smalltalk.s053: Ndinogona kuverenga, kudzvanya, kuzadza mafomu, uye kutora mifananidzo. Basa chii?
smalltalk.s054: Ndiratidze dambudziko. Ndinoshanda zvakanaka pasi pekumanikidzwa kushoma.
smalltalk.s055: Unoda tsanangudzo yemagwana? Ndinogona kufupisa Gmail, kalenda, neSlack mumasekondi 30.
smalltalk.s060: Mangwanani. Ngatiitirei nhasi kuti ive nani kupfuura nezuro.
smalltalk.s061: Mangwanani. Kofi kutanga, zvadaro kutonga nyika?
smalltalk.s062: Kuongorora kwemasikati: uchiri kushanda, kana watopinda munzvimbo yekuyendayenda?
smalltalk.s063: Masikati. Kuderera kwesimba mushure mechikafu? Handizvinzwi. Ngatifambe.
smalltalk.s066: Simba reChishanu raonekwa. Ngatipedze zvakanaka tigone kupembera.
smalltalk.s073: Danho rimwe panguva. Watoita zvakawanda kupfuura vanhu vakawanda.
smalltalk.s074: Basa rakanaka. Ndichaiisa mucheni yeumboo kuti pave neumboo kuti uri anoshamisa.
smalltalk.s081: Kusvika panguva inotevera. Zvese zvachengetwa uye zvasiiwa.
smalltalk.s082: Ndiri kubuda. Cheni yako yeumboo iri nani uye bhokisi rako rekubudisa rakachengetedzwa.

tutorial.step1_title: Email 847. Maawa 3 ehupenyu hwako. Kana masekondi 47.
tutorial.step1_body: Ndiro Muvhuro wako mangwanani, vhiki yega yega. Ndinoita iwe uchirara — kuganha, kunyora, kusiira umboo. Iwe unobvuma zvese chinhu chisati chafamba. Ipapo unoita zuva rako.
tutorial.step2_title: Manzwiro ekuti 'bhokisi risina chinhu'. Mangwanani ese.
tutorial.step2_body: Ndinoverenga email yega yega ndichiiparadzanisa: Yakakurumidza, Pindura, Chengetedza. Ndinonyora mhinduro. Unoona chaizvoizvo zvandawana nezvandanyora — zvinhu zvisati zvatumirwa. Unodzvanya Bvuma. Ndizvo.
tutorial.step3_title: Ndinokuratidza zvese. Iwe unosarudza. Ipapo ndinoita.
tutorial.step3_body: Chiito chimwe nechimwe chinoda kubvumwa kwako kwakajeka chinhu chisati chaitwa. Unogona kudzosa mvumo yangu nekudzvanya kumwe kuZvigadziriso — chero nguva, pakarepo. Handina kumboshamisa munhu. Handizotangi newe.
tutorial.step4_title: Maaphu 18. Inodzidza kamwe, ipapo haina mutengo.
tutorial.step4_body: Gmail triage, LinkedIn outreach, Slack summaries, Calendar — ne14 zvakatowedzerwa. Kumhanya kwekutanga kunoshandisa AI kuziva zvakashanda. Mushure mezvo, kudzokorora zvakashanda kuri $0.001. Kushoma kupfuura kutsvaga.
tutorial.step5_title: Pinda mahara — bhokisi rako rinomhanya mumasekondi 47 ⚡
tutorial.step5_body: Vamwe vako vachashamiswa nekunzwisisa kwako. Pinda neGoogle — masekondi 10. Kugadzirisa bhokisi kunotanga pakarepo.
tutorial.step5_joke: Vanhu vanofunga kuti wawana kugona kwakawanda. Wangova akangwara pazvekupa. — YinYang
tutorial.welcome_body: Bhurawuza yako yeAI ine kubvumwa kweOAuth3 nenzira dzeumboo.
tutorial.step2_demo_line3: Umboo wakasiiwa ▸ SHA-256 ▸ ichimirira kubvumwa kwako
tutorial.step4_guarantee1_body: Zvigadziriso → Matokeni → Dzosa. Pakarepo. Hapana email, hapana kumirira.
tutorial.step4_guarantee2_body: Dhirafiti yega yega, chiito chimwe nechimwe chinokuratidza usati chaita. Hapana chisina kutarisirwa.
tutorial.step4_guarantee3_body: Kumhanya kwega kwega kunogadzira cheni yeumboo isingashanduki. Yakagadzirwa kuongororwa. Nguva dzese.

oauth3_confirm.title: Chibvumirano cheOAuth3 🔒
oauth3_confirm.subtitle: Wava kupa mvumo kuaphu kuburikidza neSolace AGI.
benefits: 🚫 Inogona kudzoswa — funga chero nguva kubva kuZvigadziriso
📋 Yakachengetedzwa neumboo — chiito chimwe nechimwe chinonyorwa

h006_greetings: Kune avo vanochengeta zvese pamwe chete.
h011_greetings: Runyararo, mufaro, uye hapana ma bug.
